Kids vs Kid Zombies

About Da'von Manes

Da'von Manes is building the Haunted Library universe: spooky, funny, kid-friendly stories filled with school legends, monsters, mystery, family, friendship, and big imagination.

His stories are made for young readers who want books that feel exciting, visual, and easy to jump into.

News

  • Kids vs Kid Zombies is featured as the main Haunted Library title.
  • The Ascots joins the Dinoville side of the universe.
  • More Haunted Library covers and book pages are coming soon.
